name: Banana-Maple Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces fresh soft tofu, well drained
1/4 cup real maple syrup or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, puree the bananas, tofu, vanilla, nutmeg, and maple syrup until very smooth.
2. Spoon the mixture into 4 dessert glasses.
3. Chill for 1 hour.
4. Top with sliced bananas before serving.
Makes 4 servings. Each serving contains approximately 2 fruit exchange values, 1 other carbohydrate exchange value, 1/2 medium-fat meat exchange value, 220 calories, 49 grams of carbohydrate, 4 grams of protein, 2 grams of fat (including no saturated fat), 5 milligrams of sodium, 53 milligrams of calcium, and 4 grams of dietary fiber.
